title: Quebec-selected skilled workers: About the process - Canada.ca
content:
## Quebec-selected skilled workers
This program is for skilled workers who want to become permanent residents of Canada and live in Quebec.
Quebec has a special agreement on immigration with the Government of Canada. This means you need to apply to
      Quebec before you apply for permanent residence.
